property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;M:\oracle\product\10.2.0\db_1\bin;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\apache\bin;C:\Users\sonu9\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.1.2\bin;C:\Users\sonu9\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\sonu9\AppData\Roaming\npm;.

testcase.name: testGetUser
testcase.system-out:
00:44:05.299 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* Get User ***************** HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 17 May 2026 19:14:06 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "id": 1002041276, "username": "Twila Herman", "firstName": "Noelle", "lastName": "Wolff", "email": "abe.white@example.com", "password": "3jlfsk", "phone": "1-978-632-3492", "userStatus": 0 } 00:44:06.546 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* User is displayed *****************

testcase.name: testUpdateUser
testcase.system-out:
00:44:06.547 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* Update User ***************** { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "1002041276" } 00:44:07.726 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* User is updated ***************** 00:44:07.726 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* Get User after update ***************** HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 17 May 2026 19:14:08 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "id": 1002041276, "username": "Twila Herman", "firstName": "Fleta", "lastName": "Rolfson", "email": "willard.hickle@example.com", "password": "3jlfsk", "phone": "1-978-632-3492", "userStatus": 0 } 00:44:08.934 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* User is displayed after update *****************

testcase.name: testDeleteUser
testcase.system-out: 00:44:08.935 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* Delete User ***************** { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "Twila Herman" } 00:44:10.178 [main] INFO api.test.UserTest - ************* User Deleted successfully *****************

testcase.name: testCreateStore

testcase.name: testGetStore
testcase.system-out:
00:44:11.306 [main] INFO api.test.StoreTest - ************* Display Store ***************** HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 17 May 2026 19:14:12 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "id": 571903, "petId": 4501545, "quantity": 2, "shipDate": "2026-05-17T19:14:10.182+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } 00:44:12.493 [main] INFO api.test.StoreTest - ************* Store is displayed *****************

testcase.name: testDeleteStore
testcase.system-out: 00:44:12.495 [main] INFO api.test.StoreTest - ************* Delete Store ***************** { "id": 571903, "petId": 4501545, "quantity": 2, "shipDate": "2026-05-17T19:14:10.182+0000", "status": "placed", "complete": true } 00:44:13.761 [main] INFO api.test.StoreTest - ************* Store is deleted*****************

testcase.name: testCreatePet
testcase.system-out:
00:44:13.769 [main] INFO api.test.PetTest - ************* Creating Pet ***************** HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Sun, 17 May 2026 19:14:15 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "id": 5001, "category": { "id": 1, "name": "Dogs" }, "name": "Tommy", "photoUrls": [ "photo1.jpg" ], "tags": [ { "id": 101, "name": "Bulldog" } ], "status": "available" } 00:44:15.008 [main] INFO api.test.PetTest - ************* Pet is created successfully *****************

testcase.name: testGetPet
testUpdatePet
testDeletePet
testcase.system-out: 00:44:18.904 [main] INFO api.test.PetTest - ************* Delete Pet ***************** { "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "5001" } 00:44:20.069 [main] INFO api.test.PetTest - ************* Pet is deleted *****************
